titleStmt.title: SII 15.149: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 149. (B.K. No. 192 of 1928-29.) AṆṆIGĒRI, NAVALGUND TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in the prākāra of the Amṛitēśvara temple.

This is dated the 3rd regnal year of the king, Saumya, Pushya-amāvāsye, Monday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkramaṇa. The Pushya-amāvāsyā of the said year corresponded to 1190 A.D., January 7, Sunday, and the Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkramaṇa occurred on Monday, the 25th of December 1189 A.D.

It registers the gift of a fixed quantity of jawar to be supplied every month for worship and offerings to the god Svayaṁbhu Amṛitēśvara by Mahāmaṇḍalēs11vara Daṇḍina-gōva Bāchidēva. The earlier part of the record contains the description of the rājadhāni-Paṭṭaṇa Aṇṇigeṟe and its Mahājanas, the donor's family, etc.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya[śaṁbhavē .]
śrī janmasthānavāśākaradimukhaluṭhatphēnamaṁbōdhi
muttuṁgavīcivibhrājitāṁbhōdhara samudayasa
rakṣāvidhānaṁ sogayipudu ghanadhvānameṁbhōnidhānaṁ . kaṇṭha
rbbāḷēndurēkhāśikhaḥ Āśliṣṭāhipatē®paṭāparikaracchannacchaṭācchāditaḥ nmaṁ gaḷapiṁgaḷāṁśuvidaṣō
gāḷabhāḷāśritaḥ dadyānmaṇḍaḷikapracaṇḍakiraṇaśrībhāskarāya śriyaṁ . kaṁ . svastisamasta
dadhināthayūthavyāvēṣṭitabhūbhuvana bhuṁbhuka varṇnāyamānabhūribhujapratāpā
sāditaśatrugōtrananata rājyalakṣmīvallī naparimita mahāsatvasaṁsthāna
bāhuvīryyanapratimaprabaḷatara śauryanagaṇita kṣātraguṇaga
ḷayanakaḷaṁkakīrttikaumudīprakāśitāśēṣa dīkṣā paskṛta paracakra vikrāntadharāca
kranavanītaḷavijitaprasiddha yādavavaṁśamaṁḍana sēvuṇarājavallabha śrīmadbhilla
mēśvaraṁ karṇnāṭaviṣayalakṣmīkāntanāgi samantarasugeyyuttamire . tatpādapadmōpa jīvi
v® . parabhūpāḷamadāndhasindhuraghaṭāsandōhasaṁghaṭṭanōddhura siṁhaṁkali jaita
siṁhanahitakṣmāpāḷaraṁ tūḷdi bittaradiṁ beḷvalanāḍo vikṛtivyāpāramaṁ tāḷdi
nire nirgguṁḍipurēśanoḷsukhasudhāsaṁtriptacētōmayaṁ Antā beḷvalanāḍa celvi
vaṭṭiṁbaṁdadiṁ tōrppa niścintasthānamanaggadaṇnigereyaṁ bērppaṭṭiyoḷpuṭṭi vikrāntai kārjjuna
maṇḍaḷika bācaṁ pettanā jaitrasiṁhaṁ tāṁ meccuguḍalke vikramadalesavā śakti sā mā
nyame . ka . Ā pattanajanada manakkā porttu pudida rāgamaggaḷisire santāpaharamāge
radaṁbyāpitasitakīrtti bhāskaraṁ mṛdukaradiṁ . va . mattamā maṇḍaḷika bhāskarāvatāra mentenda
ḍe haracaraṇasaresijātāṁkavā nandamandākinīpavitrīkṛtalalitegātraṁ śrīmanmahāpra
gaṁ tatpriyeyenisi negaḷda dakṣiṇagauri bontāṁbikege paramapuruṣārtthame mū
rttigoṇḍu kārttikēyanavatarisidantirudiyisida mānavamarutkujaṁ dīnacintāmaṇi dāna
kānīna(ṁ)nidānīṁtana vikramādityaṁ nūtenadhanvi navīnadhanadanabhinavaśūdrakāvatā
raṁ satyarādhēyaṁ śaucagāṁgēyaṁ parākramarāmaṁ parahitajīmūtavāhanaṁ
pratyakṣakāmaṁ . sāhasa bhīmaṁ mūrttimukundaṁ janatānandaṁ . sāhityaniḷayaṁ para ba
ḷa viḷayaṁ . rāyadaḷavajrasannāhaṁ daṇḍina gōvaṁ nereyoḍe gaṇḍaṁ kaligaḷādityaṁ
subhaṭa cūḍāmaṇi . sujanarakṣāmaṇi . [A]vanījana sēbyaṁ . kṛtasarasakābyaṁ .
nārāyaṇaṁ . śauryyaparāyaṇaṁ dēvarasena kaṭṭidalagu birudara
bhāgaladēvīmanōnayanavallabhaṁ . bhayalōbhadurllabhaṁ . mattaṁ . v® . rāya
ḷēśvarara manneyavarggada sēve naṁṭu kaygāryada nāḍu sūṟetanagantaḷavaṭṭira peṁpu parvvata prāya
nippoḍaṁ madadoḷoṁdade dēvarasaṁge rājyasandhāyakavāgi bhṛtyapadadoḷnaḍevuttamanalte bhāska
raṁ . ka . dāniye karṇnānujanābhimāniye mādēvasonu sakaḷakaḷāsandhānane barmma
na tammaṁ bhūnutane bhāskarāvatāraṁ bācaṁ . v® . puṭṭida tāṇamondu posabindige tāṁ kaḍugu
jjunāgiyuṁ neṭṭane pīrdanaṁbudhigaḷēḷumanogguḍisirdda dhātriyaṁ meṭṭi samatva maṁ pa
ḍevenaṁndughaṭōdbhavanendoḍindu bērppaṭṭiye janmabhūmiyene dōṣame bhāskara nūṣme sālade
śaranidhigaṁbudoṭṭa harakārmmukamaṁ muṟidikki ninda bhīkara daśakaṇṭha kundaḷa manōvade kitta
varāharōpiniṁ dharaṇiyanetti nittarasiduddhatadaityaranotti sīḷdavaṁ sari dore pāṭi pāsaṭi sa
maṁ kali bācaṇamanḍaḷēśanoḷ . va . Āntenisi negaḷda manḍaḷika bācanaṁ tanna vaṁśābhi vṛddhigaṁ baḷa
santānasamṛddhigaṁ kaḷatrānurāgakkaṁ nityasukhānubhōgakkaṁ . puṭṭida permmegaṁ . samastajana
kūrmmegaṁ tannanāḷdara rājyaśrīya perccegaṁ dhārmmikara mecciṁgaṁ nitārttha manōrathāvā
ptigaṁ śrī jayakīrtti kānti buddhi sāmartthyasaṁprāptigaṁ . sakaḷaśāntikapauṣṭika prābhāvakkaṁ
dēvaprasāda kāruṇyabhāvakkaṁ Aihikāmutrikapadānubhavanakkaṁ . paramaiśvaryya lakṣmī bhava
nakkaṁ kāraṇamāgi mattaṁ . ka . Ā nāḍa rājadhānige nānāstrīpuruṣaratnarāśige dharmma sthānābhivṛddhi
nīkaṁ nōrppaḍaṇnigeṟe sogayisuguṁ . Ā paṭṭaṇadoḷu . v® . nirutaṁ gāvuṇḍa varggaṁ vinutaguṇa
gaṇāṁbōdhi bhūdēvavarggaṁ puravarggaṁ tadbhavaśrīvanitage nagaraṁ sāligarnnūtna ratnābharaṇa brātaṁ samantaṁbina
maḷavacōlakṣigudyaṁnivāsaṁ piriduṁ kaṇgeḍḍamādaṁtatuḷitaviḷasatpuṇyamārggaṁ trivarggaṁ .
mattaṁ Ivariṁ lōkada vīravarggavenipoṁdākhyānamaṁ tīrppavol javanaṁ jakkuli par kaḍaṁgu vibhadoḷu kayyikku
varbhīma bhairavana baggiparaṭṭi poyva siḍilaṁ mārppoyvarāḷerdda siṁgamanārddappu vareṁdoḍī samayasāsirvva
rgge māṟāṁparār . mattaṁ . varavidyāgamakauśaḷarbharataśāstrāḷaṁkapārarmmahīdhara dhairyyarvvinutēkavā
kyaraghaviddhvaṁsarśaraṇyārtthasāgararatyūrjjitadharmmarakṣara mṛtēśasvāmipādābjabhṛṁga renal baṇnisa
lāvanuṁ neṟevanēṁ sāsirvvaraṁ dhātriyoḷ . © svasti śrīmatu yādavanārāyaṇa
pratāpacakravarttibhillamadēvavarṣada mūṟaneya saumyasaṁvatsarada puṣya bahuḷadamāvā
ssa sōmavāraduttarāyaṇa saṁkramaṇa vyatīpāta puṇyatithiyoḷ śrīmadrājadhā
ni paṭṭaṇavaṇnigeṟeya sakaḷakaḷāsānniddhyavamṛtaliṁgaṁ śrī svayaṁbhuvamṛtēśvaradēva
bhōgadalu [Eḍeva] rājādhyakṣa ppa cintāyakana jīvitake Aṁgaḍiyalu teṟevane
lu �ḍana kūḷa jōḷamaṁ tiṁgaḷu tiṁgaḷamāvāsyayalu dēvaraṁgabhōga naivēdya pūje vidhānakkendu śrī
manmahāmaṇḍaḷēsvaraṁ daṇinagōna bācidēvarasaru śrīmatrivarggaṁgaḷa samayaṁgaḷa sāsirvvara
sannidhānadoḷu dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi biṭṭarintī dēvakāryyamaṁ nāḍanāḷvarasu gaḷuṁ trivargagaḷuṁ
yaṁgaḷuṁ sāsirvvaruṁ pratipāḷisuvaru © Idanīyandadoḷayde rakṣisidanaṁgiṣṭārttha saṁ
siddhi saṁbhavikuṁ yiṁtidanaḷidaṁge gaṁge gaye kēdāraṁkurukṣētrameṁbivaṟoḷu pēsede pārvvaraṁ
goravaraṁ gōbindamaṁ stīyaraṁ tave kondikkida pāpameydugumavaṁ bīḷvaṁ nigōdaṁgaḷoḷ
svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēta vasundharaṁ ṣaṣṭhivarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ
Digital edition of SII 15.149 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
